title: Opening for Software Engineer at SigTuple

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at SigTuple
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
